_comment: Community resources for Seymour and Jackson County: civic clubs, faith communities, food pantries, family-care nonprofits, recurring events, volunteer opportunities, sports leagues, scheduled volunteer days. Curated locally; corrections via /tip.html.

items.name: Seymour Lions Club
items.blurb: Service organization — eyeglasses, scholarships, community fundraisers.

items.name: Seymour Rotary Club
items.blurb: Weekly meetings, scholarships, international service.

items.name: Seymour Kiwanis Club
items.blurb: Focus on kids and youth programs.

items.name: Jackson County Jaycees (JCs)
items.blurb: Young-adult leadership and service.

items.name: American Legion Post 89
items.blurb: Veterans service organization.

items.name: VFW Post 1925
items.blurb: Veterans of Foreign Wars — events, fundraisers, hall rental.

items.name: Anchor House Family Assistance Center
items.blurb: Food pantry, household goods, family-care services. The main hub for emergency food in Jackson County.

items.name: Community Provisions
items.blurb: Pop-up grocery distribution.

items.name: Sacks of Love (SCSC schools)
items.blurb: Weekend food packs for SCSC kids.

items.name: Salvation Army Seymour
items.blurb: Food pantry and emergency assistance.

items.name: Boys & Girls Club of Seymour
items.blurb: After-school programs, summer camps, sports.

items.name: Girls Inc. Jackson County
items.blurb: Programs for girls 6–18: STEM, leadership, healthy living.

items.name: Boy Scouts Troop 575
items.blurb: Local scouting troop.

items.name: Girl Scouts of Central Indiana
items.blurb: Local troops in Seymour and Jackson County.

items.name: 4-H Jackson County
items.blurb: Animal projects, county fair, scholarships.

items.name: Project Graduation (SHS)
items.blurb: Substance-free senior celebration. Annual golf-outing fundraiser in April.

items.name: Schneck Medical Center Volunteers
items.blurb: Volunteer in patient services, gift shop, hospitality.

items.name: Anchor House volunteer team
items.blurb: Sort donations, pack pantry boxes, drive deliveries.

items.name: Library volunteers
items.blurb: Reading programs, events, shelving.

items.name: Seymour Main Street
items.blurb: Downtown beautification, festival staffing, banner program.

items.name: Make Seymour Shine (annual cleanup)
items.blurb: April citywide cleanup; the city coordinates volunteer pickup routes.

recurring.label: Things to do every week / month

items.name: First Friday Downtown
items.blurb: First Friday of the month, Apr–Oct. Music, art, food trucks on Chestnut.

items.name: Concerts at Bicentennial Park
items.blurb: Free outdoor music series, summer evenings.

items.name: Farmers Market
items.blurb: Saturday morning May–October.

items.name: Crossroads Acoustic Festival
items.blurb: Two-day downtown festival, late April.

items.name: Crossroads of Cultures
items.blurb: Annual cultural festival, early May.

items.name: Jackson County Fair
items.blurb: July, 4-H showcase, midway, livestock, music.

items.name: BurgerFest
items.blurb: Third Saturday in September, downtown.

items.name: Oktoberfest at Schwatzer's
items.blurb: Annual fall celebration with German fare.

items.name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
items.blurb: Call or text 988 — 24/7, free, confidential.

items.name: Anchor House emergency assistance
items.blurb: Emergency food, hygiene kits, household goods.

items.name: Turning Point Domestic Violence Services
items.blurb: 24-hour crisis line, shelter, advocacy.

items.name: Centerstone (mental health)
items.blurb: Local mental health and addiction services.

items.name: Indiana 211
items.blurb: Dial 2-1-1 for help finding human services in Indiana.

items.name: Seymour Little League
items.blurb: Baseball and softball for ages 5-12. Spring registration; games at Kasting/Gaiser fields.

items.name: Seymour Babe Ruth Baseball
items.blurb: Baseball for ages 13-15.

items.name: Seymour Pony League
items.blurb: Baseball/softball, intermediate age groups.

items.name: Seymour Youth Soccer
items.blurb: Spring and fall leagues for U6-U16.

items.name: SHS Owls athletics
items.blurb: Football, basketball, baseball, softball, volleyball, tennis, golf, track, cross country, soccer, swimming, wrestling.

items.name: Trinity Lutheran Cougars
items.blurb: Athletics for the private high school south of town.

items.name: Adult slow-pitch softball
items.blurb: Summer leagues at Gaiser Park / Sports Complex.

items.name: Pickleball — Seymour
items.blurb: Open play at city courts; check the city site for schedules.

items.name: Schneck Foundation 5K
items.blurb: Annual community 5K supporting Schneck Medical Center foundation.

items.name: Make Seymour Shine cleanup week
items.blurb: Citywide spring cleanup with extra curbside pickup. Sign up to staff drop-off sites.

items.name: Project Graduation golf outing
items.blurb: Senior-class fundraiser for SHS Project Graduation. Players and hole sponsors needed.

items.name: Crossroads of Cultures festival
items.blurb: Volunteer day-of for setup, info booths, kids' activities.

items.name: Jackson County Fair
items.blurb: 4-H needs gate workers, parking volunteers, livestock helpers.

items.name: BurgerFest 2026
items.blurb: Volunteer day-of: parade staging, Bun Run setup, info booths, ketchup-slide attendants.

items.name: Anchor House food drives (rolling)
items.blurb: Sort donations, pack pantry boxes, drive deliveries. Drop in any time.

items.name: Schneck Volunteer onboarding
items.blurb: New-volunteer orientation; gift shop, hospitality, patient services.

items.name: Library reading buddies
items.blurb: Help kids with summer reading; afternoon shifts in June and July.

items.name: Operation Christmas Child packing
items.blurb: Shoebox-gift packing through several Seymour churches.

items.name: Submit a community resource
items.blurb: We don't have everything. If your group, church, sports league, or volunteer event isn't listed, drop it on the tip line and we'll add it.
